title: rubus sanguineus var. cyclophyllus
intro: Rubus sanguineus var. cyclophyllus, also known as the 'Cyclophyllus' or 'Red-veined Dewberry', is a variant of the red-veined dewberry plant, belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it beneficial for wound healing and skin issues. The health benefits of Rubus sanguineus var. cyclophyllus include its ability to reduce pain, inflammation, and improve overall skin health. Traditionally, the plant has been used to prepare teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as applied topically in the form of creams and salves to utilize its medicinal properties.
